data.body:
People love to loudly freak out about about gas prices going up like 25 cents.  If you drive 10k miles a year on 20 mpg, that's $10.41 a month.

People who wouldn't even notice if some random household bill on autopay went up $10.41 a month, freak out about gas prices, because you *see* them.
